comprehend.flywheel.datasecurityconfig.D.Description: ID for the AWS KMS key that Amazon Comprehend uses to encrypt the data in the data lake.

comprehend.flywheel.datasecurityconfig.M.Description: ID for the AWS KMS key that Amazon Comprehend uses to encrypt trained custom models. The ModelKmsKeyId can be either of the following formats:  + KMS Key ID: `"1234abcd-12ab-34cd-56ef-1234567890ab"` + Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a KMS Key: `"arn:aws:kms:us-west-2:111122223333:key/1234abcd-12ab-34cd-56ef-1234567890ab"`

comprehend.flywheel.datasecurityconfig.V.Description: ID for the AWS KMS key that Amazon Comprehend uses to encrypt the volume.

Configuration parameters for an optional private Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) containing the resources you are using for the job. For more information, see [Amazon VPC](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpc/latest/userguide/what-is-amazon-vpc.html).
